title: write_verilog: emit intermediate wire for constant values in sensitivity list

features.name: constant_value_in_sensitivity_list_posedge
features.description: Code should include an always block with posedge sensitivity list containing a constant expression (e.g., posedge 1'b0)
features.snippet:
wire nop = 1'h0;
always @(posedge clk, posedge nop) begin end

features.name: constant_async_reset_in_always_block
features.description: Code should include a sequential always block with asynchronous reset using a constant value

features.name: constant_set_clear_in_sr_latch
features.description: Code should include a set-clear latch construct where set and/or clear uses a constant in the sensitivity list
